name: Team DSCC
subject: We see right through what Trump is doing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Donald Trump is asking his billionaire friends to help deliver a filibuster-proof Senate majority in 2018.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170319-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend,

Donald Trump is asking his billionaire friends to help deliver a filibuster-proof Senate majority in 2018.

_Politico_ reported that the president recently told a room full of GOP mega-donors: **"I need you guys to step up and overwhelm them" -- urging them to swamp Senate Democrats with dark money.**

Now, Trump is in the next phase of campaigning for 60 Republican votes: using the media to get his message out. In an interview with _FOX News_ on the disastrous GOP health plan, Trump complained the bill will never pass with Democrats standing in the way:

_" We only have a 2-vote margin...**If we had 60 or 60 votes, we could do something different...** The only way to get it passed is with Republican votes because of the Democrats."_
**We see right through this, friend -- and every ploy Trump pushes to attack Democratic Senators for GOP failures. We can 't let him get away with it.**

**[Can we count on you to fight back? Pitch in $1 to make sure Trump never has a filibuster-proof Senate to rubber stamp his agenda.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170319-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The reality is, we need to counter any momentum Trump is rallying from his base to target 25 Senate Democrats facing re-election year -- including 10 of them in states Trump won.

It will mean all hands on deck to hold our last blue line of defense against a Republican-controlled White House and Congress. Because if Trump is successful in gaining a filibuster-proof super majority in the Senate, there will be no way to stop him.

**[That's why we're asking you, friend: will you chip in whatever you can right now to stand with Senate Democrats in the fights ahead?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170319-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for everything you do,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e25b/2b07114c/583701cf/736b3432/2514294339/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e25b/2b07114c/583701cf/736b342d/2514294339/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e25b/2b07114c/583701cf/736b342c/2514294339/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Make your faith heard!
body:
Your children and your grandchildren's futures depend on it.

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

Your voice of faith must be heard
on the Supreme Court.

That's why I want to urge you to
call your senators to advocate for the quick confirmation of the
Supreme Court Justice nominee, Judge Neil M. Gorsuch, today.

Judge Gorsuch is an exceptionally
qualified and experienced judge who is respected across partisan
lines. He has a demonstrated history of…

Protecting the religious
freedom of every individual, regardless of faith tradition
Championing constitutional
law, not pushing his own personal policy preferences
Safeguarding the American
people against government overreach and abuse

A surge of people who oppose
these principles are aggressively contacting Congress. We must
act now.

Your faith matters, so call your
senators today!

Thank you,

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

name: John Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
As Washington debates the future of health care in our country,
I've continued my efforts to share with congressional leaders and
the President's administration Ohio's successful formula for
lowering medicaid costs and improving the quality of health care.

Peter, as Washington debates
the future of health care in our country, I've continued my
efforts to share with congressional leaders and the President's
administration Ohio's successful formula for lowering Medicaid
costs and improving the quality of health care.

I support repealing and replacing
Obamacare but it's critical that we work together to ensure that
our most vulnerable citizens are not left behind. If we hope to
create lasting reforms, both parties must work together.

This past week, I joined
Republican Governors Rick Snyder (MI), Brian Sandoval (NV) and
Asa Hutchinson (AR) in writing a letter to House Speaker Paul
Ryan and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell providing them
with a roadmap on how they can fix Obamacare while ensuring that
our most vulnerable - the drug addicted, mentally ill and
working poor - get the care they need. Read more (here).

I was also a guest on CNN to
discuss this more. Watch the interview (here).

Our team was also excited to
announce this past week that thanks to smart investment
management, our workers compensation system will be able to offer
a $1 billion rebate to public and private employers. Combined
with earlier rebates and rate cuts, we've been able to save
employers more than $6 billion.

By continually looking to reduce
workers compensation costs, Ohio has been able to create a much
better climate for success for job creators, government employees
and workers. Read more (here).

Thank you for your support!

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
Hearings begin today in the U.S. Senate for Judge Neil Gorsuch to serve as the next Associate Justice of the Supreme Court. Judge Gorsuch is an inspired choice with sterling academic credentials, a brilliant legal mind and a steadfast commitment to constitutional principles. Judge Gorsuch will honor the legacy of Justice Antonin Scalia. He is a strong believer that judges should base their decisions on the law and the Constitution, not on their own policy preferences or personal feelings. President Trump is proud to have nominated him and looks forward to a fair and speedy confirmation.

**GET INVOLVED**
Stand with President Trump and Support Judge Neil Gorsuch as he enters his first day of hearings.
[Support Judge Neil Gorsuch. Sign the petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=633dbb00a2c033017bf03a2c6772223a2051d7834262d0254ed62303b550479f8441cdf3bd000a2a9ad3cc955780ad43419e8f3d10bf0f3c)

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: re: Trump and Russia (add your name)
body:
Demand an independent investigation into Trump's ties with Russia
---
**Add your name and demand an independent investigation into Trump's connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170320_dnc_nd&source=em_20170320_dnc_nd")**
Friend --

Moments ago, FBI Director James Comey confirmed that the FBI is investigating Russia's interference in the 2016 election and whether the Trump campaign colluded with the Kremlin to swing the election in Trump's favor.

**[Now more than ever, we need an independent investigation into Trump's ties to Russia, with a special prosecutor who will find the truth.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Now+more+than+ever+we+need+an+independen&utm_campaign=em_20170320_dnc_nd&source=em_20170320_dnc_nd")**

Donald Trump has long insisted that the Trump-Russia connection was all in our heads. As recently as this morning, he tweeted that "Democrats made up and pushed the Russian story."

In typical Trump fashion, he's trying to deflect attention from bad news and hide from facts he doesn't like. **But today's testimony is more proof that it's past time for an independent investigation that will get to the bottom of the Trump campaign's coordination with Russia. Add your name to join Democrats who are demanding one today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170320_dnc_nd&source=em_20170320_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 700,000 people [SIGN ON!]
disclaimer_text: paid for by eliminating health care for 24 million hard-working Americans
body:
This spells disaster for all of our communities. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA2NTYyOTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTU5NDQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, We cannot go back to the way things were before. The new Republican health care plan will spell disaster for our country and our state. Here in Washington, we'll be impacted by huge decreases in coverage at a greater cost. Over the past eight years, Washington has made huge strides in health insurance coverage. But the new health care plan is an enormous threat to that. That's why I am so committed to fighting tooth and nail so this dangerous health care proposal never becomes law. We can't afford to let hundreds of thousands of Washingtonians go back to the old days of having ineffective health care coverage. And I need you to help me show Republicans that they are causing a public outcry -- because our citizens deserve health care they can afford. [**Join me in telling Republicans: Don 't put millions of Americans and hundreds of thousands of Washingtonians in danger with this new health care bill!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA2NTYyOTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTU5NDQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) The impact of this new plan on Washington would be incredibly harsh:
* 700,000 people will lose coverage
* The uninsured rate will go up from 5.8 percent to 15 percent -- higher than before the ACA and higher than projections of ACA repeal with no replacement
* To cover those losing Medicaid coverage would cost the state $1.3 billion per year by 2023 -- and $1.8 billion by 2028
* A new penalty will be put in place when a consumer or patient tries to purchase insurance after a break in coverage.

In the end, **the only ones to benefit from this scheme are wealthy Americans** who get a massive tax cut paid for by eliminating health care for 24 million hard-working Americans. For the rest of us, we get less care at more cost. We need to stop this now. [**Stand up for Washingtonians -- and all Americans -- who depend on the Affordable Care Act every day!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA2NTYyOTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTU5NDQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you for putting up a fight alongside me. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SHARE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTA2NTYyOTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMTU5NDQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The wrong budget priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

President Trump's federal budget proposal puts forward the wrong priorities for America and Virginia.

The budget would eliminate Virginia jobs, cut needed programs and services, and endanger our environment. **That is why President Trump's budget is unacceptable to me -- and I 'd like to know I have your support. [Will you stand with me for a budget that helps Virginia thrive?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jB%2FX58tjj%2BLRRhbFFpNSwIY5TYD7PJ54)**

To start, the Trump budget continues to treat federal employees -- 170,000 of whom live in Virginia -- as a punching bag. It promises to shrink the federal workforce without explaining why or how; this would hurt jobs and families in our Commonwealth.

His budget also eliminates funding for the Appalachian Regional Commission, which works to promote economic development in 13 Appalachian states, including Virginia.

While I support the budget's investment in America's defense capabilities, the proposed drastic cuts to the State Department would jeopardize our national security. Additionally, the budget proposes a huge increase to pay for the construction of a border wall with Mexico, despite the president's promise that taxpayers would not be on the hook for this misguided project.

A huge proposed cut to the Environmental Protection Agency would eliminate the Chesapeake Bay Program and slash programs critical to combatting sea level rise in Hampton Roads and climate effects across Virginia. And despite the president's promises to invest in infrastructure, there's nothing in the budget that would help Virginia fix our roads and bridges.

America's budget must reflect our priorities: Taking care of our communities in addition to mounting a robust national defense. **As a member of the Senate Budget Committee, I will work with my Republican colleagues to stop this budget 's devastating cuts and develop a roadmap that helps, not hurts, our Commonwealth.**

**[Please add your name to support a budget that helps Virginia thrive.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MEql0XSSy3QY0mJb2upebRBYqDPOXdXH)**

Thank you,
Tim

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Here's where things stand on Judge Gorsuch:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Neil Gorsuch, President Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court. I wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Neil Gorsuch, President Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170320-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend,

I wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Neil Gorsuch, President Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court.

**Today, the Senate Judiciary Committee began hearings that will let us better understand his record and his judicial philosophy.**

But I want to be clear: To this point, we've seen plenty of evidence that should make us skeptical about Judge Gorsuch's willingness to side with average Americans over the powerful.

Indeed, in many of his most prominent decisions, Gorsuch has shown that he's inclined to favor CEOs over citizens, executives over employers, and corporations over consumers.

So, in these hearings, Senate Democrats are going to work to get answers. And then, we're going to require Mitch McConnell to find at least 60 votes to see Gorsuch confirmed.

**President Trump 's allies are actively targeting Democrats in the Senate** because they think they can limit the effectiveness of our opposition.

One group of conservative activists started planning the campaign to see Gorsuch confirmed well before his nomination became public. **The day after Trump named his pick, they announced their intention to spend at least $10 million on an advertising campaign largely focused on Democratic senators** in five states that had voted for Trump in the 2016 election.

**[This fight won't be easy, and we need to make sure our lawmakers know we have their backs. Chip in $1 right now.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170320-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Now _The Washington Post_ is reporting that conservative groups are outspending progressives twenty to one in the battle for the Supreme Court.

The hearings that begin today are an opportunity to learn the truth about Gorsuch, but as of today, we're in danger of getting completely drowned out by these conservative ideologues.

**And by the way, Republicans are hoping for Gorsuch to get a vote as soon as April 7. So we don 't have much time. **

Those are all the reasons why I'm asking for your help. Will you make sure Democrats have the resources we need?

**[http://dscc.org/supreme-court-fight](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170320-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Chuck

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
March 20th, 2017

WARRENTON, VA - Today, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for lieutenant governor, expressed deep appreciation for the endorsement by the Virginia Citizens Defense League's (VCDL) Political Action Committee.Over the weekend the VCDL-PAC released their endorsement of Jill Vogel for lieutenant governor after a unanimous vote by their board to endorse Vogel in the race. The announcement follows recent endorsements from countless others around the Commonwealth, adding to the momentum of the campaign that is on a clear path to victory in the June 13th Republican primary and the General Election in November.VCDL-PAC Chairman Bob Sadtler said, "Jill Vogel has been a leader on our issues when others would not. She has the best and most consistent record of anyone in the race for lieutenant governor. Her record and long history of introducing strong pro-gun legislation in Virginia's Senate distinguishes her among her colleagues," he added. "VCDL-PAC is proud to endorse Jill Vogel for lieutenant governor and every gun-owning Virginian should vote for Jill Vogel in her June 13th primary."Jill Vogel currently has a 100% rating in the VCDL voting scorecard and she has consistently earned top marks on voting scorecards issued by the VCDL for her steadfast defense of gun rights in Virginia. This year, Vogel introduced more pro-gun bills strongly supported by the VCDL than any other Senator."I am very honored to receive VCDL-PAC's endorsement and proud of my time spent defending the rights of law-abiding Virginians," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "From defending our sporting heritage, to expanding carry rights, to fighting for womens' rights to defend themselves, I am proud to stand up for every law-abiding Virginian's Second Amendment rights."The VCDL is a Virginia-focused gun rights group with an enormously influential and loyal following whose energized support is of tremendous importance in nominating contests"VCDL-PAC's endorsement is among the most sought after in Virginia politics," added Vogel Campaign Manager Pat Trueman. name: Democrats.org
subject: A GOP Congress, unstable president, and Trump rubber stamp on the Supreme Court
body:
Stand with Democrats as we fight back against Trump's SCOTUS nomination
---
**Add your name: tell the Senate to reject Judge Gorsuch's nomination.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170320_ew_nd&source=em_20170320_ew_nd")**
Friend --

The confirmation hearings for Donald Trump's pro-corporation, ultra-conservative nominee -- Neil Gorsuch -- began today.

There's no question that he'd be a disaster if confirmed to the Supreme Court.

Gorsuch hasn't shied away from making his right-wing political views known in his public statements throughout his career and rulings.

He sided with Hobby Lobby in the notorious case that allowed employers to refuse to provide contraceptive coverage to their female employees.

He believes that corporations are people, and has continually ruled against working people in cases that involve allegations of employers discriminating against employees because of their race, sex, age, and disability. In one noteworthy case, he was the lone judge to rule against a trucker who was fired when he abandoned his trailer to avoid freezing to death.

And if all that weren't enough to make you question Neil Gorsuch's ability to rule impartially and fairly, he has even written about his personal disdain for liberals using the judicial system to protect the civil rights of all Americans.

With a dangerous GOP-controlled Congress and an unstable president, the last thing we need is a Donald Trump toady like Neil Gorsuch on the Supreme Court.

**Democrats are standing together to make sure that Neil Gorsuch isn't confirmed to the highest court in the land. Add your name and say you'll join us to stop Neil Gorsuch.**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170320_ew_nd&source=em_20170320_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

name: BREAKING (via Van Hollen HQ)
subject: painfully real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Today, we got confirmation from FBI Director James Comey that Donald Trump's wiretapping claims were baseless and that there is currently an FBI investigation underway to examine Russian interference in our election and possible coordination with the Trump campaign.

You would be hard pressed to make up a scenario like this -- but this is all too painfully real. Not only do we have a Chief Executive that made baseless accusations about wiretapping, but he and his Administration have doubled down on them with a brazen disregard for the truth and utter disrespect for the office of the president.

[**The actions of Trump and his team are putting our country at risk and undermining the ability of friend or foe to rely on the word of the United States. This must end.
